title: Thy Will Be Done.
content:
Searcher of Hearts!--from mine erase
        All thoughts that should not be,
    And in its deep recesses trace
        My gratitude to Thee!

    Hearer of Prayer!--oh, guide aright
        Each word and deed of mine;
    Life's battle teach me how to fight,
        And be the victory Thine.

    Giver of All!--for every good--
        In the Redeemer came--
    For raiment, shelter, and for food,
        I thank Thee in His name.

    Father and Son and Holy Ghost!
        Thou glorious Three in One!
    Thou knowest best what I need most,
        And let Thy will be done.
meaning:
"Thy Will Be Done." is a quintessential example of George Pope Morris's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
